首页 / 自由职业者费率计算器

自由职业者费率计算器

根据你的技能、经验水平和目标市场计算理想的时薪、日薪和月收入。

场景预设：

如何使用此工具

1
选择你的主要技能。
2
选择你的经验水平。
3
选择你的目标市场。
4
查看推荐的时薪、日薪、周薪、月薪和年薪。
5
向下滚动对比不同技能和经验水平的费率。
6
tools.solopreneur-freelance-rate-calculator.how_to_use.5

常见问题

我怎么知道费率定高了？

如果你每个提案都能拿下，说明你的费率太低。目标是在价格上丢掉20-30%的提案——这意味着你在收取你应得的价值。

该对不同客户收不同费率吗？

应该。给初创公司低一些（换取股权），给企业高一些。根据项目复杂度、交付压力和长期合作价值来调整。

我应该多久涨一次费率？

每6个月或每完成3个项目后。提前30天通知现有客户。新客户直接按新费率来。

什么是按价值定价？

对于能够量化客户ROI的项目（如"这个落地页能带来5万美元收入"），按预期价值的10-20%收费，而不是按时收费。

这些费率对亚洲市场现实吗？

计算器会根据区域市场调整。但如果你远程为美国/欧洲客户工作，不管你在哪里生活，都按美国/欧洲费率收。

结果

示例

💼 Freelance Rate Calculator

💰 Target Rate Snapshot: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Target Annual Net: $80,000/yr • Business Expenses: $10,000/yr (12.5% of target) • Desired Profit: $20,000/yr (25.0% margin) • Billable Hours: 1,200 hrs/yr • Required Hourly Rate: $75.00/hr ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📐 Rate Multipliers: • 1x base rate: $75/hr • 1.25x skilled: $94/hr (proven track record) • 1.5x premium: $113/hr (specialized niche) • 2x expert: $150/hr (top-tier authority) • Daily Rate (8 hrs): $600/day • Weekly Rate (5 days): $3,000/wk • Monthly Rate: $12,990/mo • Yearly Rate: $155,880/yr ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🩺 Market Position: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • 🟢 Market-rate — competitive for your skill level. • 🟡 Billable utilization: 1,200 hrs/yr (industry: 900-1,400) • 🟢 Expenses at 12.5% of income — lean operation. • 🟡 Profit margin 25.0% — workable, room to grow. 🎯 Rate Ladder (market context): ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Junior: $45/hr (entry, building portfolio) • Mid-Level: $75/hr (3-5 yrs, market median) • Senior: $120/hr (6-10 yrs, specialist) • Expert: $188/hr (10+ yrs, top authority) • Your rate: $75/hr (100.0% of market median) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ⚖️ Break-Even Rate: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Break-even (expenses only): $8.33/hr • Break-even + profit: $75.00/hr (your required rate) • At current billable hrs (1,200), every $10/hr raise adds $12,000/yr • To hit $120,000/yr net: raise to $100.00/hr ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔄 What-If Scenarios: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Raise rate 20%: $$90/hr → $108,000/yr gross • Raise rate 50%: $$113/hr → $135,600/yr gross • Cut expenses 25%: Save $2,500/yr → break-even drops to $6.25/hr • +200 billable hrs/yr: Same rate → $105,000/yr gross (was $90,000) • Move to expert tier (2x): $$150/hr → $180,000/yr gross Junior (60%): $45/hr → $360/day | $7,794/mo | $54,000/yr at 1,200 hrs Mid (100%): $75/hr → $600/day | $12,990/mo | $90,000/yr at 1,200 hrs Skilled (125%): $94/hr → $752/day | $16,281/mo | $112,800/yr at 1,200 hrs Premium (150%): $113/hr → $904/day | $19,572/mo | $135,600/yr at 1,200 hrs Expert (200%): $150/hr → $1,200/day | $25,980/mo | $180,000/yr at 1,200 hrs
